entries.title: compliance-team-eu-ai-act
entries.description: EU AI Act (Regulation (EU) 2024/1689) operational compliance specialist for compliance teams. Three deterministic tools: AI system risk classifier (Article 5 prohibited / Article 6 + Annex III high-risk / Article 50 limited-risk / minimal-risk per the binding regulation), conformity assessment planner (Article 43 Module A vs Module H + notified-body routing + Annex IV technical documentation checklist), obligation tracker (provider/deployer/importer/distributor obligations matrix per Title III Chapter 3 + GPAI obligations per Articles 51-55). 4 in-depth references: Titles I-XII Article-by-Article walkthrough, Annex III 8 high-risk categories with Article 6(2) carve-outs, GPAI obligations including systemic-risk threshold, cross-framework mapping to ISO 42001 + NIST AI RMF + GDPR. Stdlib-only. Built for compliance officers executing Article-level conformity work — not for executive AI strategy (see chief-ai-officer-advisor for that).

entries.description: Bundled design + quickstart skills, code-writing and code-review subagents, lint guard + end-of-turn verify hooks, runtime-error and OCC-insights monitors, and MCP server for live deployment introspection. The quickstart scaffolds a running app from one sentence and builds it live LOCALLY, narrated in chat; the convex-reviewer subagent audits Convex functions for auth, validators, and performance. Build reactive, type-safe backends on one platform — schema, real-time, file storage, scheduled jobs, and AI agents.

entries.title: slim
entries.description: Local-only token-saving plugin for Claude Code and Grok: smart Search, batch Edit, code symbol index, flat-file savings telemetry, and hybrid semantic memory. Pure JS, no native modules. No login, no third-party services.

entries.description: Visual output surface for Claude Code: display text, images, tables, plots, and interactive elements

entries.title: dash0-agent-plugin
entries.description: OpenTelemetry observability for Claude Code sessions. Captures tool calls, LLM invocations, token usage, and errors as OTel traces.

entries.title: vp-knowledge
entries.description: Basic Memory power tools: multi-ecosystem package research (npm, Rust, Go, PHP, Python, Ruby), developer tool research (Homebrew, GitHub Actions, Docker, VSCode, gh CLI extensions, Claude Code plugins, skills.sh bundles), person research, knowledge gap analysis, project context priming, knowledge exploration, Readwise integration, schema evolution, tag alignment, graph maintenance, and automated quality hooks.

entries.title: icf-classification
entries.description: Access WHO ICF (International Classification of Functioning, Disability and Health) codes. ICF complements ICD diagnosis codes by describing how health conditions affect a person's functioning in daily life - covering body functions, body structures, activities/participation, and environmental factors.

entries.title: dx
entries.description: Developer experience essentials: GitHub Actions debugging, conversation cloning/half-cloning, context handoffs, research (Reddit and Hacker News), and Claude Code version checks

entries.title: build-loop
entries.description: Multi-phase build orchestration with native debugging: assess, plan, execute, review, iterate. Plan-verify gate on Phase 2. Optional UI design gates. Native debug-loop, debugging-memory, and logging-tracer skills provide root-cause investigation without a bundled MCP server. Orchestrator owns when-to-fire; bundled skills own procedural detail; the logging-tracer skill includes an optional Coding Debugger escalation hop to the standalone supporting plugin for extended capability.

entries.title: laceyp99-skills
entries.description: laceyp99-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entries.title: makoto
entries.description: Holds Claude Code to its word — every claim checked against the agent's own logged record; faked checks blocked, not warned. Two-tier catalog (18 pre-checks, 8 Stop gates), each shipped at measured zero false positives.

entries.title: larch
entries.description: Multi-agent workflow automation for Claude Code: issue-anchored `/design` (one direct-drafting flow; plan-review panel), `/bug` (consumer issue-filing helper), `/deps` issue dependency audits, and `/implement` (positional `<issue-N>`, fixed 7200s Step 2 timeout, optional `--merge`, `--forked`, `--draft`, `--no-admin-fallback`, `--no-logs-commit`, `--coder`, `--run-id`). `/implement` Preflight reads the `larch:plan` block from the issue body; `/implement` Step 5 code review always uses the unified strict panel internally (public `--panel` argv removed).

entries.title: more-paper-workflow-pro-skill

entries.title: dolphin
entries.description: Custom static analysis powered by Opengrep. Generate rules with Claude, run them in CI.

entries.title: codebrief-capture
entries.description: Codebrief intent capture — distills developer intent locally at session end, after a git push, or after a PR is created, and sends only derived annotations (never code) to your Codebrief workspace.

entries.title: tempo
entries.description: Turn a natural-language date/time problem into correct, validated Tempo (Elixir) — ISO 8601 / IXDTF representation plus relations, set algebra, recurrence, scheduling, and constraint networks — and get a plain-language answer.

entries.title: obsidian
entries.description: Create and edit Obsidian vault files including Markdown, Bases, and Canvas. Use when working with .md, .base, or .canvas files in an Obsidian vault.

entries.title: agent-factory
entries.description: A Praxis-backed agent factory: a single-agent plan -> execute -> verify loop with compounding memory, delivered as Claude Code skills. Coding-first behind a general task+oracle seam.

entries.title: snarc
entries.description: SNARC — salience-gated memory for Claude Code. Scores every tool use on 5 dimensions (Surprise, Novelty, Arousal, Reward, Conflict) at capture time. Four-tier memory: buffer → observations → patterns → identity. Automatic context injection, dream cycles, confidence decay.

entries.title: last30days
entries.description: Research any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, Polymarket, GitHub, and 5+ more sources. AI agent scores by upvotes, likes, and real money - not editors.

entries.title: claude-tdd-pro
entries.description: Drop-in plugin that elevates any codebase to Google's published engineering standards (eng-practices, JS/TS style, Python style). /analyze produces a citable compliance report; /remediate executes a small-CL plan that ratchets the codebase toward the bar; every greenfield prompt is gated by the same RUBRIC.yaml. Hardened against prompt-injection, secret-leakage, and protected-branch commits. Auto-disclosure via Assisted-by: trailer.

entries.title: sf-security-review-toolkit
entries.description: Skills that prepare an ISV partner for the AppExchange/AgentExchange security review end to end — autonomous multi-agent codebase audit, submission-artifact generation, scan orchestration, test-environment runbooks, and an honest readiness verdict.

entries.description: Multi-agent apartment search: a main-context orchestrator fans out parallel profiler subagents that score listings against a weighted preference profile, with a deterministic floor for acoustics/HVAC, geo-noise, flood risk, and cost.

entries.title: shelf
entries.description: Kyle's reading library + deterministic, keyless book-recommendation engine. Recommend, retrieve, add, and maintain books; drives the local shelf CLI.

entries.title: pdd
entries.description: PDD (Parity-Driven Development) — framework para refactor/rewrite/port de sistemas legados com paridade comportamental rastreável: evidência objetiva (score de confiança + harness de comparação), testes de caracterização, QA como portão de merge, PR-dossiê e painel de progresso.

entries.title: cc-fleet
entries.description: Run any model with an Anthropic- or OpenAI-compatible API (e.g. DeepSeek, GLM, Kimi, Qwen, MiniMax) — even your Codex subscription — as real Claude Code workflows, agent-team teammates, or one-shot subagents, driven exactly like native ones. Your main session's own auth is untouched (OAuth subscription or API key, either works); API-key providers bill the provider key via apiKeyHelper, while a Codex subscription bills through a local OAuth daemon — each worker receives its credential on demand, never through its env or argv. Requires the `cc-fleet` binary on PATH, installed separately.

entries.title: rig
entries.description: rig — a LEGO-style harness composer. Compose bricks (facets/patterns/steps/recipes) at invocation time into a task-specific agent harness. Domain-agnostic engine: dev-flow orchestration (review, implement, PR), pluggable packs — sales deal-review, a conversational mode (rig:talk), a goal-driven loop (rig:goal), existing-PR review (rig:pr), and a prose AI-smell remover (de-ai-smell) — plus a --validate doctor, a /rig:init scaffolder, generators for reviewer personas (/rig:persona) and LLM-wiki domain knowledge (/rig:knowledge), self-extension that authors new bricks/packs from a description and validates them (/rig:forge), a /rig:catalog cross-tier registry, and run-continuity that survives context compaction via a shipped PreCompact hook. Tiered (project/global) personas and a cross-linked knowledge wiki keep domain knowledge shared, not siloed. Claude Code native; no heavy DSL engine.

entries.description: Multi-provider notification plugin for Claude Code

entries.title: plumb-line

entries.title: axhub

entries.title: optionsahoy
entries.description: Deterministic US equity-compensation tax optimizer. Seven tools: incentive stock option (ISO) / alternative minimum tax (AMT) exercise planning, non-qualified stock option (NSO) sell-vs-hold, restricted stock unit (RSU) vest-and-sell, single-stock concentration, protective puts and collars, qualified small business stock (QSBS) qualification, and equity funding plans (which shares to sell to net a target after-tax amount by a deadline). Federal plus 50-state plus DC tax math.

entries.title: mad
entries.description: mad (MultiAgent Decanting) — orquestração multi-agente em modo decanting nativo do Claude Code. O Arquiteto coordena especialistas via Agent tool (sem claude -p, sem processos em background); cada feature é uma sessão viva que externaliza aprendizado obrigatoriamente ao fim (decanting). Memória institucional em arquivo, trust ladder por agente, guardrails proporcionais ao blast radius, dashboard HTML local cross-platform e telemetria OpenTelemetry GenAI. Thin wrapper sobre Claude Code: Windows nativo, macOS e Linux.
